name: [WIP] Terrain Shadow Removal
author: automata-rtx
description: Removes the animated ground-shadow overlay that Twilight Princess bakes into the terrain material itself (the slowly swaying dappled shade on forest/field floors) - a different system from the 'moya' particle shadows. It works by zeroing the overlay's TEV strength register on the cloud-shadow terrain materials (MA00/MA01/MA16 scroll, MA04 static) after the game sets it, so only the shadow stage is cancelled and the base ground is left fully intact - no holes. Per-material-code toggles plus a live logger let you keep the overlay in areas you want it. The big rolling Hyrule-Field cloud shadows are the separate moya system and are not touched here. EXPERIMENTAL and off by default.
